reviews.review_title: I love this game please make more
reviews.review_description: I love this game please make more just like it I've been waiting for a while ever since Tekken 7 VR this reminds me a lot of it I do appreciate the effort and skills that was put into making this game feel and look the way it does the developers of this game have done a wonderful job and I will let all those who not aware of this game inform them to go and buy it immediately please keep them coming I look forward to seeing more of your work in VR development great job team five stars I will give you a 10 if I could
